cases.description: The product-truth topic should return the agentic commerce article.
The ai-native-publishing topic should return the auditable research article.
A keyword search for 'agent' should match both published articles.

Backlog ratchet: published articles serving draft-state claims must not exceed the tracked backlog (83 articles as of 2026-07-17, meta#61). Lower maxResults as the backlog burns down; any new draft-serving article fails the guard.
The agentic commerce article is related to the auditable research article via the related graph edge.
